member.name: M:TopicInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a topic info object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TopicInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.ConsensusGetTopicInfoResponse)
member.summary: Create a topic info object from a protobuf.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.TopicId
member.summary: The ID of the topic for which information is requested.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.TopicMemo
member.summary: Short publicly visible memo about the topic. No guarantee of uniqueness.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.RunningHash
member.summary: SHA-384 running hash of (previousRunningHash, topicId, consensusTimestamp, sequenceNumber, message).

member.name: P:TopicInfo.SequenceNumber
member.summary: Sequence number (starting at 1 for the first submitMessage) of messages on the topic.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.ExpirationTime
member.summary: Effective consensus timestamp at (and after) which submitMessage calls will no longer succeed on the topic.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.AdminKey
member.summary: Access control for update/delete of the topic. Null if there is no key.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.SubmitKey
member.summary: Access control for ConsensusService.submitMessage. Null if there is no key.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.AutoRenewPeriod
member.summary: If an auto-renew account is specified, when the topic expires, its lifetime will be extended by up to this duration (depending on the solvency of the auto-renew account). If the auto-renew account has no funds at all, the topic will be deleted instead.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.AutoRenewAccountId
member.summary: The account, if any, to charge for automatic renewal of the topic's lifetime upon expiry.

member.name: P:TopicInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.
